rows.label: qev013804_MSG0001
rows.name:
Haa... Earthling jobs are
quite hard, aren't they...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0002
rows.name:
I am helping an architect, but I
can't seem to do it very well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_SEL0011
rows.name:
Suggest that Wikae
attend Alex's seminar.

rows.label: qev013804_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Wikae that you appreciate
how difficult it must be.

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0003
rows.name:
A person named Alex is holding a
meeting...? That is wonderful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems my understanding of Earthling culture
and customs will deepen. Perhaps he will even
teach me about architectural beauty![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0005
rows.name:
I want to know more about
Earthlings. I will definitely
participate in Alex's meeting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0006
rows.name:
That is true. But I like Earthlings.
This is also a rewarding job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's just that, sometimes I
become a little timid...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0008
rows.name:
It would be nice if there was
an opportunity or place to get
advice during those times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0009
rows.name:
Because the aesthetic sense
is completely different between
us Ma-non and Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013804_MSG0010
rows.name:
I hope to be able to understand those
aspects as well through Alex's meeting.[ST:wait ]
